content: {"question":"What do 12-week retention curves and protocol-compliance telemetry from commercial intermittent fasting apps reveal about the real-world gap between RCT-reported metabolic benefits (weight loss, HbA1c, insulin sensitivity) and at-home effectiveness, and how has continuous glucose monitor integration altered adherence and outcomes?","search_queries":["intermittent fasting app 12-week retention rate adherence drop-off commercial","16:8 time-restricted eating real-world effectiveness vs randomized controlled trial","Zero Fastic DoFasting user retention cohort analysis churn","continuous glucose monitor CGM integration intermittent fasting app adherence outcomes","time-restricted eating HbA1c insulin sensitivity weight loss meta-analysis 2024"],"perspective":"Industry"}
